titleStmt.title: SII 20.177: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 177. (B.K. No. 23 of 1937-38.) CHŪRGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a Nandi-pillar in front of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year • • •, Sādhāraṇa Pushya s11u. [1]1, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. During the reign of Bhillama the cyclic year Sādhāraṇa corresponded with Śaka 1112. In that year, the details correspond to 1190 A.D., December 24, Monday. The saṁkrānti occurred on the following Wednesday.

The inscription states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bandugidēvarasa and Mahāpradhāna Māyidēva-daṇḍanāyaka made a gift of the village Chōrahārige situated in the division (kaṁpaṇa) of Thirty-six villages in Tardavāḍi Thousand for the benefit of the temple of Kapilasiddha-Mallikārjuna of Sonnalige which is called Abhin11ava Śrīśaila.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Ōṁ jaya paramēśvara paramātma Īśvaranu vurbbīparbbiyaḍaṁgi
koṁḍirppane Ōrbaṇnageyāgi yōgigaḷa mana
da koneya jyōtīśvaranuṁ vriṣabhana rūpāgi yajamā
nanuṁ Ācāryyanuṁ tāneyāgi yōgādisaṁpanna khaḷeya
gaḷellavaṁ saṁpādisi yōgaramaṇiya kṣētramane taḷavi
ṭṭu salākheviḍidu Abhinavaśrīśaiḷavane māḍi kapilasiddha
mallēśvaradēvane nelasi niṁdu puṁṇnyapāpaṁgaḷaṁ baravēḷdu be
saṁ pēḷuttaviralu yēṁ besadēvā yenalu yī sthāna
dalu mānyavāgi Ūrugaḷaṁ bhūmigaḷaṁ dhanaṁgaḷaṁ Ī
liṁgakke hastōdakavaṁ māḍi koṭṭuduvaṁ manaṁ pēsade śeḷedukoṁḍapeneṁbā
tana Ātana mātāmātāpitrugaḷella yeppattēḷukōṭivarṣaṁbaraṁ
puḷugoṁḍada narakadoḷagikki nīnāhutigoṁḍiru kaṁḍā yele pā
pavē yī dēvana bhūmidhanakkānaṁjuveneṁdu pāvaḍarddante manaṁ
bedaṟi poḍavaṭṭana bēga śīghraṁ koṇḍu bā kaṇḍā yele puṁ
ṇnyavē kaviḷāsakke yinteraḍara beṁge pu(ṁ)ṇya pāpaṁgaḷa
pārddu koṇḍirddoyvudu tappadu diṭha diṭha sa

svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda dvārāvatīpuravarā
dhīśvara viṣṇuvaṁśōdbhava vikāsa
bhāskara māḷaviya malla vāraṇāṁ
kuśa yarirāya śrīmatu yādavanārā
yaṇapratāpacakravattiśrīmadbhilama sādhāraṇa saṁ
vatsarada puṣya suddha 11 ne sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa śaṁ
krāntiyalu śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ taddhavāḍipu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ nāraṇa dhīsvaraṁ perbbaṭṭe kāḷāṁjarapu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ sanivārasiddhi neṟeyoḍe gaṁḍa saṁgrāma
bhīma nuḍidante gaṇḍa celake śaraṇāgata
vajrapaṁjara tāgidirānta niyaṁ paṟi
worn out
śrī bhōgēśvaradēvara dibyaśrīpādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaru
mappa śrīmatu vīrabaṁdugidēvarasaruṁ śrīmanu
mahāpradhāna māyidēvadaṇnāyakaruṁ mukhyavāgi dakṣi
ṇavāraṇāsi Abhinavaśrīśaiḷavenippa soṁnaligeya
śrī kapilasiddhamallikārjunadēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga
jīrṇnōddhāra Avāricchatrakke taddavāḍisāyiradoḷagaṇa kaṁpaṇa
da mūvattāṟiṁbāḍada baḷiya grāmacōrahārigeyaṁ
sarbbanamasyavāgi koṭṭa dharmma caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salguṁ yī dharmmavaṁ
pratipāḷisidavare biṭṭaru yī dharmmakke vakrastarā
davaru yadhōgatigiḷivaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
